title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Indian Oil Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indian Oil Corporation:
Indian Oil Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation!
